case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. KEVIN B NORMOYLE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,965.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT NORMOYLE, KEVIN B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.97 - SERVED JUN-20-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NORMOYLE, KEVIN B
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OFFICE OF THE TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KEVIN B. NORMOYLE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORMOYLE, KEVIN B $1,965.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,010.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
